bt_xml:
<root BTCPP_format="4">
  <BehaviorTree ID="MainTree">
    <ReactiveFallback>
      <Sequence name="GoalCheck">
        <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(searched sector_a)"/>
        <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(classified sector_a)"/>
      </Sequence>
    <Sequence>
      <Sequence name="move(uav1,base,sector_a)">
          <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(at uav1 base)"/>
          <StubMoveAction param0="uav1" param1="base" param2="sector_a"/>
          <SetWorldPredicate predicate="(at uav1 sector_a)" value="true"/>
          <SetWorldPredicate predicate="(at uav1 base)" value="false"/>
      </Sequence>
      <Sequence name="search(uav1,sector_a)">
          <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(at uav1 sector_a)"/>
          <StubSearchAction param0="uav1" param1="sector_a"/>
          <SetWorldPredicate predicate="(searched sector_a)" value="true"/>
      </Sequence>
      <Sequence name="classify(uav1,sector_a)">
          <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(at uav1 sector_a)"/>
          <CheckWorldPredicate predicate="(searched sector_a)"/>
          <StubClassifyAction param0="uav1" param1="sector_a"/>
          <SetWorldPredicate predicate="(classified sector_a)" value="true"/>
      </Sequence>
    </Sequence>
    </ReactiveFallback>
  </BehaviorTree>
</root>
